nasb.text: All the choice men in all his troops will fall by the sword, and the survivors will be scattered to every wind; and you will know that I, the Lord, have spoken.”

esv.text: And all the pick of his troops shall fall by the sword, and the survivors shall be scattered to every wind, and you shall know that I am the Lord; I have spoken.”

cnv.text: 他軍中所有的精兵，都必倒在刀下；剩下的也必分散到四方；你們就知道說這話的是我耶和華。

ccb.text: 他所有的精兵都要丧身刀下，余下的也要四散逃窜。这样，你们就知道这是我耶和华说的。
